title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

International Registered Students

Announcements

Deadline for Residence Permit Submission

08
						December

2025

All

newly admitted students

who have not yet submitted their residence permit application documents are required to bring

all necessary documents

to the university

by 11.12.2025

.

Please be informed that, in accordance with the regulations,

residence permit application files submitted after this date will not be accepted under any circumstances

. Students who fail to complete this process on time may face interruptions in their registration and official student status.

We kindly ask all students to complete their document submission promptly and ensure that their applications are delivered within the stated deadline.

Best Regards

International Students Office

en

tr
